# Vin Bhaskara

> Senior Research Engineer at Borealis AI working on Foundation Models and LLMs. Vector Scholar, IIT Silver Medalist, Kaggle Competitions Expert, and academic reviewer for NeurIPS, CVPR, ICLR, and ICML.

This is the personal website and blog of Vin Bhaskara, covering research, publications, and writing on machine learning, foundation models, and LLMs.

## Pages

- [About](https://vinbhaskara.github.io/about/): Biography, background, and contact information.
- [Personal](https://vinbhaskara.github.io/personal/): Personal interests and non-research activities.
- [Sitemap](https://vinbhaskara.github.io/sitemap/): Full list of pages on the site.

## Content

- [Posts](https://vinbhaskara.github.io/year-archive/): Blog posts organized by year.
- [Categories](https://vinbhaskara.github.io/category-archive/): Posts grouped by category.
- [Tags](https://vinbhaskara.github.io/tag-archive/): Posts grouped by tag.

## Feeds

- [Atom feed](https://vinbhaskara.github.io/feed.xml): Site-wide feed of new posts.
- [Sitemap XML](https://vinbhaskara.github.io/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable sitemap.
